query:
SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, startTimeEst, 
       awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread, bookTotal, awayML, homeML,
       modelAwayScore, modelHomeScore, modelTotal, awayModelSpread, homeModelSpread,
       modelAwayML, modelHomeML, modelAwayWinPct, modelHomeWinPct,
       modelAwayPuckLine, modelHomePuckLine, modelAwayPLCoverPct, modelHomePLCoverPct,
       modelOverRate, modelUnderRate, publishedModel, publishedToFeed,
       awayGoalie, homeGoalie, awayGoalieConfirmed, homeGoalieConfirmed
FROM games 
WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-23' AND sport = 'NHL';
